title: At the Doctor's Office
description: Describe symptoms and book a follow-up. Polite, semi-formal medical English.

t1.text: Good morning. Please come in and have a seat. What brings you in today?

templates.text: Hi doctor, I've had a sore throat for about a week now.
templates.hint_zh: 醫生好,我喉嚨痛已經大約一個禮拜了。

t3.text: I see. Any fever, cough, or trouble swallowing?

templates.text: A bit of a cough, mostly at night. No fever as far as I know.
templates.hint_zh: 有一點咳嗽,主要是晚上。我不覺得有發燒。

t5.text: Alright. Are you taking any medication right now?

templates.text: Just some over-the-counter cold tablets, nothing else.
templates.hint_zh: 只有買成藥的感冒藥,其他都沒有。

t7.text: Okay. Let me take a quick look. Open your mouth wide and say 'ah'.

t9.text: Mild inflammation. Not bacterial, I think. Plenty of rest, warm fluids, and these throat lozenges. Come back if it gets worse.

templates.text: Got it. Should I take time off work?
templates.hint_zh: 了解,我需要請假休息嗎?

t11.text: A day or two if you can. You'll bounce back faster.

templates.text: Thank you, doctor. I really appreciate it.
templates.hint_zh: 謝謝醫生,真的很感謝你。
